title: Raccoon Removal in Gowanus, Brooklyn | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Gowanus, Brooklyn. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons have become increasingly common in Gowanus, Brooklyn, drawn to the neighborhood's mix of industrial buildings, residential properties, and proximity to the Gowanus Canal. These intelligent animals seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces while foraging through garbage and compost bins. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services to protect your Gowanus property from damage and health risks.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience handling raccoon infestations throughout Brooklyn, with specialized knowledge of Gowanus's unique building structures—from converted warehouses to brownstones. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, provide complete exclusion services, and offer warranties on all raccoon removal work.
localContext: Gowanus's ongoing redevelopment and proximity to Prospect Park create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in areas near the canal and along Bond Street, Carroll Street, and Union Street. The neighborhood's mix of older industrial buildings and newly renovated residential spaces provides numerous entry points that raccoons exploit for nesting and shelter.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Gowanus typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of nesting areas, and extent of exclusion work needed. A thorough inspection allows us to provide an accurate estimate for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Gowanus, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Gowanus due to the abundance of food sources, water from the canal, and numerous shelter opportunities in both residential and industrial buildings. The neighborhood's ongoing construction also displaces raccoons, causing them to seek new den sites in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Gowanus properties?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage including torn roof shingles, destroyed insulation, chewed electrical wiring, damaged HVAC ducts, and contaminated spaces with feces and urine. They can also create entry holes in soffits, fascia boards, and vents that allow water intrusion and secondary pest problems.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Gowanus home?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removals in Gowanus are completed within 3-7 days, though the timeline depends on factors like the number of animals, presence of babies, and location of the den. We begin with trap placement within 24 hours of your call and monitor daily until all raccoons are safely removed and exclusion work is complete.
